species: Here, we report the identification of CD209L/L-SIGN and the related protein CD209/DC-SIGN as receptors capable of mediating SARS-CoV-2 entry into human cells.
tissue: prominent expression of CD209L in the lung and kidney epithelia and endothelia.
cell_type: human endothelial cells are permissive to SARS-CoV-2 infection.
disease_state: To investigate the potential involvement of CD209L and CD209 in COVID-19...
sample_source: we first examined expression of CD209L in human tissues from SARS-CoV-2 target organs...
cell_line: we confirmed expression of CD209L in human umbilical endothelial cells immortalized with telomerase (HUVEC-TERT cells)...
